required_secrets.name: STEXOR_APP_REPO_TOKEN
required_secrets.purpose: Read-only checkout token for the application repository when it is private or cross-repository.

required_variables.name: DAST_TARGET
required_variables.purpose: HTTPS staging target for OWASP ZAP baseline scans.

required_secrets.name: DEPLOY_SSH_KEY
required_secrets.purpose: Private deploy key used by the Hostinger deployment job.

required_variables.name: DEPLOY_REMOTE
required_variables.purpose: SSH destination for the Hostinger VPS deploy user.

required_variables.name: DEPLOY_REMOTE_DIR
required_variables.purpose: Absolute infrastructure path on the Hostinger VPS.
